name: ltm-wiki
description: AI-agent long-term memory wiki. No external runtime: pure markdown skills with a global pointer and git/Obsidian backends.

interface.shortDescription: Long-term memory wiki for AI agents
interface.longDescription: Use LTM Wiki to let AI agents remember, recall, consolidate, and maintain durable knowledge in one user-owned memory store that every session can reference. It needs no external runtime: pure markdown skills resolve a global pointer, and you choose a git or Obsidian sync backend.
defaultPrompt: Recall relevant long-term memory for this task.
Check this memory store for stale or broken entries.
